meridian-adobe-wall.alt_text: A hand rendered adobe wall caught in low raking sunlight, its lime and clay surface holding a warm grazing light.
meridian-adobe-wall.generation_prompt: Editorial architectural photograph: a hand-troweled adobe and lime-render wall filling the frame, low raking sun grazing across the surface from the left so the hand-applied clay texture reads in relief, warm ochre-to-umber tonal gradient, soft film grain, restrained monumental composition, deep tonal range. no text or logos.
meridian-adobe-wall.placement: Hero — full-bleed backdrop behind the Meridiana sundial wordmark

meridian-ridge.alt_text: An eroded ridge of compacted earth standing across a wide sunlit plain at the close of day.
meridian-ridge.generation_prompt: Editorial landscape photograph: a long eroded ridge of compacted ochre earth standing across a wide flat sunlit plain, fine wind-cut gullies down its face, pale hazy sky above and a bleached foreground plain below, late-day warm light, atmospheric depth, restrained horizon composition, film grain. no text or logos.
meridian-ridge.placement: Full-bleed plate — 'The wall is a clock. The colour is its hand.'
